Yeah totally understand. I can explain more via email but how has your total revenue been? Our commission is on a sliding scale as the lower earning accounts have way thinner margins than the higher. So for instance our commision on an account doing above 50k per month is significantly less than a creator doing less than that (upon signing with us). Would love to hear your experiences with management and why marketingâs been difficult for you though!?
Hey, I currently have a team but find it hard to market. Can you please set out your commission scale?

Hey! Love the content. I actually manage some of the top creators on OF and Telegram (mostly within the top 1% and some in the top .1%)! We specialize in 360 marketing and work with a select group of niche creators and other creators we know we can scale. What are you doing for marketing right now? We manage a bunch of platforms, which most agencies donât do. This includes full chat team and managers, IG, Reddit, X, Telgram and we do OFTV creation and content houses every month or two. Would love to talk about you joining our team. You have a great page and I think we could scale you a lot. Plus we have a competitive commission scale. Let me know if you want to setup a phone call or group chat with my team to discuss what we can do! We have all female account management as well and our teams based between Palm Beach and LA! Let me know if you have any questions. Would love to talk more!
